title: Sylvan curation slice complete: process-before-archive invariant
body: Sylvan closeout for the team curation slice. Claims: b113551e closed as superseded, 03079e91 closed after correction slice, 24c58ea8 closed after tiny pending-graduations route. Changes: encoded owner correction that knowledge curation comes first and no unprocessed content may be archived; separated preservation-over-fitness scope from archive-after-processing scope so buffers are covered; added cron-template owner-input-precedence pending route; completed sidebar-pattern/distilled audit slice. Validation: focused markdownlint on touched memory/rule/skill/pattern/plan/archive docs passed; git diff --check passed. Shaded gate-runner report also passed markdownlint/diff-check and recorded fitness informational remains CRITICAL only by known pending-graduations pressure. No active Sylvan claims remain.
